calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for the Plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Paul Lam sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Olivia Faiva (deceased), Talanoa Talanoa Jr.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited and terminated.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 289 Rey Street, San Francisco, CA 94134
Damages $9,108.00
Pre-judgment interest None
Attorney's Fees None
Costs Per Memorandum of Costs to be filed.
for a Total Judgment of $9,108.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-FEB-07-2013:
Plaintiff MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA is represented by Paul Lam who is present with Attorney Daniel M. Bornstein

Defendants OLIVE FAIVA and TALANOA TALANOA, JR. are not present.

This settlement conference is placed off calendar. The trial date of
FEB-11-2013 remains on calendar.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Feb-07-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing is present. Represented by Paul Lam.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Olive Faiva (deceased) and Talanoa Talanoa Jr., ARE NOT present.
Attorney Josh Schieber who has oral authorization to represent the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels orally request that the MSC and trial dates be continued due to the demise of Ms. Faiva and the hospitalization of Mr. Talanoa Jr. Court approves said request. Settlement conference is continued to FEB-07-2013 and JURY TRIAL is continued FEB-11-2013. Court to send notice.
